name: Beans Bourguignonne
recipeIngredient: 1 large Carrot, sliced into half rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart soup pot, sauté onion in 1 tablespoon of butter.
2. Add carrot and potato; stir in water, tomato paste, thyme, and bay leaves.
3. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes and carrots are cooked, about 20 minutes. Add more water if necessary to keep vegetables covered.
4. Toward the end of cooking time, add wine, beans, garlic, and salt. Return to a boil; lower heat and simmer uncovered for 10 more minutes. Remove bay leaves and discard.
5. Meanwhile, sauté mushrooms over low heat in the remaining tablespoon of butter. Combine with the bean mixture and serve. Perfect with a wedge of crusty bread.
